name: Strabimon

signature_move.name: Licht Nagel
signature_move.description: Slices up its enemies with claws on both arms that radiate with light.

description: A Digimon that was transformed into a half-beast, half-man form when Wolfmon 's power was halved. Because it has not lost its "Combat Instinct", unlike the similar half-beast, half-man Flamon , it has a ferocious side. For that reason, although it has the appearance of a Child Digimon, it will sometimes rampage enough that even the typical Adult Digimon is unable to control it. As with Flamon, although its power was decreased, it seems that Adult-class Digimon aren't a match for it. Its Special Move is cutting the opponent to pieces with the shining claws on its hands ( Licht Nagel ).
